name: Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp.
summary: Part I Overview Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp. was organized as a Virginia corporation in 2022 to serve as the holding company for Burke & Herbert Bank & Trust Company. The Company became a bank holding company when it commenced operations on October 1, 2022, following a reorganization transaction in which it acquired control of the Bank under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956 (BHCA).
